NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into on this 15th day of October 2023, by and between Mr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC: S3456789H), with a place of business at 123 Orchard Lane, Singapore 567890, and Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, representing Abdullah Solutions Pte Ltd (UEN: 200312345Z), located at 456 Raffles Street, Singapore 678901. Both parties may be referred to individually as "Party" and collectively as "Parties."

1. Confidential Information. In connection with the business discussions, the Parties anticipate disclosing certain confidential and proprietary information ("Confidential Information"). Confidential Information shall include, but is not limited to, business plans, financial statements, customer lists, and technical specifications. The recipient of such information agrees to maintain its confidentiality and not disclose it to third parties without prior written consent.

2. Non-Disclosure Obligations. The Parties agree that they shall not use the Confidential Information for any purpose other than the discussions and evaluations related to potential business collaboration. Any breach of this Agreement will entitle the disclosing Party to seek injunctive relief and any other legal remedies available under the laws of the Republic of Singapore.

For any communication regarding this Agreement, please contact Mr. Tan Wei Ming at +65 6789 1234 or via email at weiming.tan@example.sg. Alternatively, Ms. Siti Aishah can be reached at +65 9876 5432 or siti.abdullah@abdullahsolutions.sg.
